overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing a rainy night walk through a futuristic city. The player moves along wet neon-lit streets toward a large commercial building with holographic billboards, passing modern glass architecture and illuminated advertisements in a high-density urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban intersection with neon signage

events.description: passing the Pacific Blvd street sign and leaving the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rainy intersection toward the city center

entered.detail: green street sign with white text mounted on a metal pole at the intersection
tall metal pole with traffic signals and hanging lights
modern glass facade building with vertical illuminated signage and reflective windows
tall futuristic skyscrapers with scattered lights visible through the rain and fog

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a rainy urban intersection marked by a Pacific Blvd street sign. The player walks forward through the wet streets, passing a traffic light pole on the right while a large glass commercial building rises on the right side. The distant skyline is visible through the hazy rain, with neon lights reflecting off the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street corridor with glass storefronts

events.description: large horizontal billboard structure becomes visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing down the wet street alongside illuminated commercial buildings

entered.detail: large horizontal digital billboard spanning across the street showing illuminated advertisements
dark building facade with glowing rectangular windows and signage

segments.scene_description: Moving along the commercial corridor, the right glass building now dominates the near view while the street stretches ahead. A massive horizontal billboard structure becomes visible in the distance, spanning the width of the street. The left side features dark commercial buildings with illuminated windows, and the wet pavement continues to reflect the neon city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching large commercial complex with overhead billboard bridge

events.description: approaching the overhead billboard structure that spans across the street

agents.ego_description: walking toward the destination building with large holographic displays overhead

entered.detail: massive dark building with grid-like facade and multiple illuminated signs at street level
bright vertical neon signs attached to building facades

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the destination building, with the massive horizontal billboard structure now looming overhead and growing larger in the frame. The right-side glass building falls behind as the street leads directly toward the large building facade ahead. Neon signage illuminates the right side while the wet street reflects the bright overhead advertisements, creating an immersive cyberpunk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a rainy urban intersection that gradually narrows into a corridor dominated by massive holographic advertisements. It begins at a street corner marked by a Pacific Blvd sign, moving forward past a traffic light and a towering glass commercial building while neon lights shimmer on the wet asphalt. As the camera advances along the commercial corridor, the glass architecture on the right persists while a massive horizontal billboard structure begins to emerge in the distance, spanning the width of the street. The scene then shifts as the camera approaches the destination building, causing the overhead billboard to loom larger and more imposing in the frame. Finally, the right-side glass building falls behind as the street leads directly toward a bright building facade, with the wet pavement reflecting the intense glow of the overhead neon signage.
